governingBody: Wisconsin corrections agencies and prison mailrooms
reasonSummary: The Wisconsin prison-ban record treats the book as excluded reading inside state custody, which shows how prison and mailroom censorship function as a government reading regime. The exported reason says: Depicts.
note: The Wisconsin prison-ban record treats the book as excluded reading inside state custody, which shows how prison and mailroom censorship function as a government reading regime. The exported reason says: Depicts attempted rape of minor, glorifies criminal.
